ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dialogue_lines" (
  "line_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each dialogue line */,
  "speaker" TEXT /* Name of the speaker (NPC or player) */,
  "npcid" TEXT /* NPC ID if the speaker is an NPC */,
  "voice_type" TEXT /* Type of voice used for the line */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the speaker if applicable */,
  "quest" TEXT /* Quest associated with the dialogue line */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch within the quest or scene */,
  "category" TEXT /* General category of the dialogue (e.g., Scene, Topic) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of dialogue (e.g., SceneDialogue, PlayerDialogue) */,
  "subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of the dialogue if applicable */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the dialogue if applicable */,
  "response_index" TEXT /* Index for the response within the topic */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the voice file */,
  "full_path" TEXT /* Full path to the voice file */,
  "file_found" INTEGER /* Indicates if the voice file was found */,
  "modified_since_file_creation" REAL /* Time elapsed since the file was last modified */,
  "topic_text" TEXT /* Text of the topic if applicable */,
  "prompt" INTEGER /* Index of the prompt within the topic */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the dialogue response */,
  "emotion" TEXT /* Emotional tone of the dialogue */,
  "postprocess" TEXT /* Post-processing instructions for the voice file */,
  "script_notes" TEXT /* Scripting notes for the dialogue line */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the dialogue line was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the dialogue line was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for the dialogue line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dialogue_lines_speaker FOREIGN KEY ("speaker") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dialogue_lines_quest FOREIGN KEY ("quest") REFERENCES quests ("quest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dialogue_lines_subtype FOREIGN KEY ("subtype") REFERENCES subtypes ("subtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dialogue_lines_npcid FOREIGN KEY ("npcid") REFERENCES npcs ("npc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dialogue_lines_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dialogue_lines_voice_type FOREIGN KEY ("voice_type") REFERENCES voice_actors ("voice_actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dialogue_lines_branch FOREIGN KEY ("branch") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dialogue_lines_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dialogue_lines_topic FOREIGN KEY ("topic") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "speaker_name" TEXT /* Name of the speaker */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the speaker if applicable */,
  "voice_actor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voice actor for the speaker */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the speaker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "npcs" (
  "npc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NPC */,
  "npc_name" TEXT /* Name of the NPC */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the NPC */,
  "voice_actor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voice actor for the NPC */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the NPC */,
  "backstory" TEXT /* Backstory of the NPC */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("npc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voice_actors" (
  "voice_actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voice actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the voice actor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the voice actor */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Experience of the voice actor */,
  "specializations" TEXT /* Specializations of the voice actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voice_actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quests" (
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quest */,
  "quest_name" TEXT /* Name of the quest */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quest */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Starting location of the quest */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* Ending location of the quest */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward for completing the quest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenes" (
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scene */,
  "scene_name" TEXT /* Name of the scene */,
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quest containing the scene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the scene */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the scene takes place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dialogue branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quest containing the branch */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subtypes" (
  "subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subtype */,
  "subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the subtype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subtype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subtype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voice_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voice file */,
  "line_id" TEXT /* ID of the dialogue line the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the voice file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the voice file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_found" INTEGER /* Indicates if the voice file was found */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the voice file */,
  "quality" TEXT /* Quality of the voice file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voice_files_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES dialogue_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "voice_actor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voice actor providing feedback */,
  "line_id" TEXT /* Reference to the dialogue line being feedbacked */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the voice actor */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the voice actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_voice_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("voice_actor_id") REFERENCES voice_actors ("voice_actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES dialogue_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voice file being annotated */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp for the annotation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes for the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES voice_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the writer involved */,
  "voice_actor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voice actor involved */,
  "audio_engineer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the audio engineer involved */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_audio_engineer_id FOREIGN KEY ("audio_engineer_id") REFERENCES audio_engineers ("audio_engineer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_voice_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("voice_actor_id") REFERENCES voice_actors ("voice_actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "line_id" TEXT /* Reference to the dialogue line being versioned */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voice file being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for the dialogue line or voice file */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES dialogue_lines ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES voice_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Name of the writer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the writer */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Experience of the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_engineers" (
  "audio_engineer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio engineer */,
  "audio_engineer_name" TEXT /* Name of the audio engineer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the audio engineer */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Experience of the audio engineer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audio_engineer_id")
)
